reasoning_content:

Usually, this implies a list of objects with their bounding boxes. I will use the format `[ymin, xmin, ymax, xmax]` as is common in OCR tasks, or just standard `[x1, y1, x2, y2]`. Let's stick to a standard `[x_min, y_min, x_max, y_max]` format for clarity, or follow the pattern of the internal reference if available.
